description: §6.5.5 array reassignment reactivity (RT): `@items = [...@items, x]` spread-reassignment is reactive (DQ-2 reassignment-canonical). One #add click grows the array 2→3; the <each> over @items re-renders (3 .item rows) and the @items.length interpolation re-reads (Count: 3). No mutating method — pure reassignment drives the subscribers.
rationale: §6.5.5 full replacement: `@items = [...@items, x]` is standard reactive assignment (DQ-2 reassignment-canonical) and triggers all subscribers of @items identically to a mutation — the <each> re-renders and @items.length re-reads. One click grows the list 2→3.
